text: In India, a hospital's ICU is often a claim — not a real capability.
Facility Trust Desk ranks every facility by its evidence.
Green: corroborated. Amber: only claimed. Gray: unknown.
Look up any hospital by name…
…and see the exact sentences behind every rating.
The app even overturns its own ratings — 378 of them.
A human always decides. Every override is signed and kept.
755 districts, joined with India's official health survey.
Red: a real medical desert. Gray: we just don't know yet.
One click exports a brief the team can defend.
